zh.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler是Robert Alyn和Lady Anna De Bures的女兒，於大約1550年出生在英國英格蘭。她於1571年與Oliver Bunker在英國英格蘭貝德福爾廷格利特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1625年5月26日在英國貝德福爾廷格利特享年76歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾廷格利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler是Robert Alyn和Lady Anna De Bures的女儿，于大约1550年出生在英国英格兰。她于1571年与Oliver Bunker在英国英格兰貝德福爾廷格利特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1625年5月26日在英国貝德福爾廷格利特享年76岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾廷格利特。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler was born about 1550, in England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Alyn and Lady Anna De Bures. She married Oliver Bunker in 1571, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 26 May 1625, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler est née environ 1550, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert Alyn et Lady Anna De Bures. Elle a épousé Oliver Bunker en 1571, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 26 mai 1625, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler wurde um 1550 in England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert Alyn und Lady Anna De Bures geboren. Sie hat 1571 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Oliver Bunker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 26. Mai 1625 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler è nata il circa 1550 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert Alyn e Lady Anna De Bures. Lei sposato Oliver Bunker nel 1571, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 26 maggio 1625, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Chandlerは約1550年にイギリスイギリスでRobert AlynとLady Anna De Buresの娘として生まれた。1571年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスでOliver Bunkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1625年5月26日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスで76歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler(은)는 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Robert Alyn(와)과 Lady Anna De Bures의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1571년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 Oliver Bunker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1625년 5월 26일 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Chandler родилась около 1550 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Robert Alyn и Lady Anna De Bures. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Oliver Bunker в 1571 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 26 мая 1625 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия.
